summary: Iteration 3 testing complete - New features (Leaderboard, Gerry LLM Chat) working. Progress sync has DB schema issue requiring main agent fix.

critical.issue: Database schema issue: player_progress.user_id has NOT NULL FK constraint to profiles table. Anonymous device-based progress sync fails with 'null value in column user_id violates not-null constraint'
critical.root_cause: The player_progress table requires user_id to be a valid UUID from profiles table. Current implementation tries to use null for anonymous users but schema doesn't allow it.
critical.suggested_fix: Either: 1) Alter player_progress table to make user_id nullable, OR 2) Create anonymous profile entries for device-based sync, OR 3) Use a different table for anonymous progress

action_items: FIX REQUIRED: Modify player_progress table schema to allow anonymous device-based progress sync (make user_id nullable OR create anonymous profiles)
CLEANUP: Remove test data from scores table (TEST_Game, rls_verify_test entries)
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed submit_score endpoint - user_id was being set to player_name string instead of null UUID
Progress sync endpoint needs DB schema change to work with anonymous devices
Gerry LLM integration working correctly with emergentintegrations library

success_rate.backend: 88% (15/17 tests passed, 2 skipped due to DB schema issue)

test_credentials: None required - public anon key used
seed_data_creation: Test scores submitted to leaderboard (TEST_Game entries)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 tested new features: Leaderboard (GET/POST working), Gerry LLM chat (working with GPT-4.1-mini), Progress sync (GET works, PUT fails due to DB schema). The player_progress table has NOT NULL FK constraint on user_id referencing profiles table - this prevents anonymous device-based progress sync. Main agent needs to either alter the table schema or implement a different approach for anonymous progress storage. All other features working correctly.

leaderboard.POST /api/leaderboard/submit: PASS - submits scores (fixed user_id to null)

progress_sync.GET /api/progress/{device_id}: PASS - returns null for unknown device

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The player_progress table in Supabase has a NOT NULL constraint on user_id column with a foreign key reference to profiles table. When trying to insert progress for an anonymous device, the code sets user_id to null which violates the NOT NULL constraint.
rca_of_the_issue.error_message: null value in column 'user_id' of relation 'player_progress' violates not-null constraint
reproduction_steps: 2. Backend tries to insert with user_id=null
3. Supabase rejects due to NOT NULL constraint
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Main agent needs to alter the player_progress table schema: ALTER TABLE player_progress ALTER COLUMN user_id DROP NOT NULL; OR implement anonymous profile creation
